one_line: Built a cited SREGym-vs-ours pass@1 comparison (stdlib script + report) pulling our numbers from real A1/A2 artifacts; honest no-ranking framing shows our fair single-attempt band (best_of_n/rex_no_oracle ~0.31-0.34) sits below SREGym E2E (32.9-60.7% no-noise) while REx 0.90 is flagged as a different multi-attempt+oracle regime with no SREGym counterpart, plus 10 non-equivalence caveats; selftest passes.
